title: GOOD: Idempotent init with TOCTOU protection in lichen_lora_l2_init
description: lora_l2.c lines 184-194: Double-init is caught under the mutex, not before. The comment explains why: if checked outside the lock, two threads could both pass the check and generate different EUI-64s. This is correct security-conscious coding that looks 'wasteful' but prevents a real race.
